PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

applications. Strong background in React, Node.js, and cloud deployment, with a focus on clean architecture and
developer experience.

WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior Frontend Engineer — Skyloop Technologies
Pune, India | Mar 2023 – Present
 Led migration of a legacy AngularJS app to React + TypeScript, improving page load speed by 35%.
 Built a component library adopted across 5 product teams, reducing UI development time by 25%.
 Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, cutting deployment time from 40 minutes to 6.
 Reviewed pull requests and mentored 3 junior developers on testing best practices.
Full-Stack Developer — Quantix Software Solutions
Hyderabad, India | Aug 2020 – Feb 2023
 Developed and maintained a multi-tenant SaaS platform using Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL.
 Designed REST APIs serving over 50,000 daily active users with 99.9% uptime.
 Containerized services with Docker, simplifying local development and staging deployments.
PROJECTS
TaskFlow — Open Source Kanban App
 Built a real-time collaborative kanban board using React, Socket.io, and MongoDB.
 Reached 800+ GitHub stars; implemented drag-and-drop boards with optimistic UI updates.
